scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "cd backend && uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" "cd frontend && pnpm dev -- --host 127.0.0.1"
scripts.stop: lsof -i :8000 -t | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -i :5173 -t | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo stopped
scripts.build: cd frontend && pnpm install && pnpm build
